model_input:

The user wants me to click the "Docs" link in the navigation bar.
Looking at the screenshot, the navigation bar is at the top.

- About: from x=339 to x=410 (approx)

The navigation bar is at the top. The text "Docs" is centered vertically in that black bar.
The bar height is from y=0 to about y=85.
The text "Docs" is around y=40.
Actually, looking closer, the "Docs" text is roughly at x=303, y=40.
Why was it outside? Maybe the clickable area is different or my estimate was slightly off.
Let's re-examine the "Docs" text location.
The word "Docs" itself is centered in its column.

Center x: ~303.

y is around 40.

Let's try (303, 42) or just re-verify the center.
